markdown:
#  How does Procore calculate an invoice's 'Current Payment Due' amount? 
##  Answer 
When preparing an [invoice](https://v2.support.procore.com/glossary-of-terms) in one of Procore's Project Financials tools, the 'Application for Payment' associated with the invoice shows the 'Current Amount Due' for the [billing period](https://v2.support.procore.com/glossary-of-terms). Procore calculates the value in _Line '8. Current Payment Due'_ by subtracting the amount in _Line 7. 'Less Previous Certificates for Payment'_ from _Line 6. 'Total Earned Less Retainage.'_
  * For upstream invoices, see Contractor's Application for Payment
  * For downstream invoices, see Subcontractor's Application for Payment


### Contractor's Application for Payment
When viewing an [upstream invoice](https://v2.support.procore.com/glossary-of-terms) for a [client contract](https://v2.support.procore.com/glossary-of-terms), [funding](https://v2.support.procore.com/glossary-of-terms), or [prime contract](https://v2.support.procore.com/glossary-of-terms), the invoice includes the 'Contractor's Application for Payment' shown below.
##### Example
In the 'Contractor's Application for Payment' below, the 'Current Amount Due' is calculated as follows:
**Line 6 minus Line 7 equals Line 8**
**$35,421.00 - $7,740.00 = $27,681.30**
![Prime Current Payment Due](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/eeb1806d6cf6dd08b68a44d6cdff38c6/4053ad9d7fe8517eb88a6704f192a130/prime-current-payment-due.png?fm=webp)
### Subcontractor's Application for Payment
When viewing a [downstream invoice](https://v2.support.procore.com/glossary-of-terms) for a [commitment](https://v2.support.procore.com/glossary-of-terms), the invoice includes a 'Summary Preview' that includes the 'Subcontractor's Application for Payment' shown below.
##### Example
In the 'Subcontractor's Application for Payment' below, the 'Current Amount Due' is calculated as follows:
**Line 6 minus Line 7 equals Line 8**
**$28,130.00 - $26,339.00 = $1,791.00**
![Commitments Current Payment Due](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/1a941226b7eda1a822d5d7d2046e6847/76d4dbed59774789d9b01187fff40196/commitments-current-payment-due.png?fm=webp)

title: How does Procore calculate an invoice's 'Current Payment Due' amount?
description: Describes how Procore calculates the amount in the 'Current Payment Due' field on upstream and downstream invoices.
